text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After training, I spot an Umamusume with a
troubled look on her face.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I always run with force... No, that's not it. I make
sure to have fun... and do my best? That's not it
either...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Well... The school newspaper said that they
wanted to write an article on me...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
But I've always been really bad at those kinda
things. I was just thinking about how I should
respond to their questions.
choice_data_list: Why don't you show them how you train?

Think of it as a chance to work on your
weaknesses.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I see... I wouldn't have to explain anything
verbally then.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Thanks. I'll try doing just that.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
You're right... I shouldn't run away from things all
the time just because I'm bad at them.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: But I still don't know what to do...
choice_data_list:
Maybe you can prepare some notes
beforehand?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Thanks. I'll give it a shot.
